title: Subscription
subtitle: Your membership group determines which models you can use and how much.

credits.permanentHint: Purchased credits never expire and are used after your timed credits run out.

upgradeBody: Group changes are handled by an administrator. Contact your workspace admin to move to this group.

redeem.title: Redeem a code
redeem.subtitle: Enter a code to activate or extend a membership group.

errors.alreadyUsed: This code has already been redeemed.
errors.disabled: This code has been revoked by an admin.
